subject: CBS-Client to support config fetch from a configMap
commit_message:

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

(6 comments)

Please update change-log and top up version.

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

(2 comments)

The implementation seems weird for me. I would suggest creating a composite class (in place of current CbsClientImpl) consisting of CbsClientConfigMap and CbsClientRest, which would call CbsClientConfigMap.get(...), check for exception, if it happens call CbsClientRest.get(...) if it fails fallback to built-in file config.
